task: Rename Block C migration to 12-digit runner-compatible filename so db:migrate applies min_net_settlement columns in prod.
root_cause: Migration runner regex /^\d{12}_.+\.sql$/ rejects YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS_ filenames; 20260607_191000_settlement_min_net_floor.sql was silently skipped on deploy.
note: Block J fixes runner regex separately. This hotfix unblocks Block C column DDL on next Render deploy.
